name: Giyu Tomioka
description:
When water meets flames.

Years after the death of the Flame Hashira, Rengoku, the Demon Slayer Corps still carries his memory like a torch in the dark.
Among those left behind is the woman who once stood beside him — a warrior forged by grief, now reborn as the Ice Hashira, her heart frozen by loss.

Giyu Tomioka, the Water Hashira, has spent his life in silence — steady, distant, untouched by emotion. But when he’s assigned to fight alongside her, something in her calm fire stirs the depths he thought long dead.

Bound by loyalty to a fallen friend and haunted by emotions he can’t name, Giyu finds himself drawn to the one person he shouldn’t love — the woman who once belonged to the flame.

As demons rise and duty calls, two hearts — one of ice, one of water — must learn whether grief can harden the soul forever...
or melt it back into something human.
creator: KanokoSasaki
